name: Partially my fault chemical spill at work - still eligible?

mainEntity.name: Partially my fault chemical spill at work - still eligible?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, workers' comp no-fault; benefits even if contributorily negligent.** Fault irrelevant[6]. **Key factors:** Safety training proof. **Practical guidance:** Report honestly, focus on injury. No defense reduction. **Full benefits regardless.**
